mapper.sql: id, coupon_name AS couponName, coupon_type AS couponType, discount_amount AS discountAmount, discount_rate AS discountRate, max_discount_amount AS maxDiscountAmount, use_threshold_amount AS useThresholdAmount, valid_days AS validDays, scope_type AS scopeType, is_new_user_coupon AS isNewUserCoupon, status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mk_coupon WHERE id = #{couponId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM mk_coupon c WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1
AND c.is_new_user_coupon = 0
AND ( NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mk_coupon_store_rel r WHERE r.coupon_id = c.id) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mk_coupon_store_rel r WHERE r.coupon_id = c.id AND r.store_id = #{storeId}) )
ORDER BY c.id DESC

SELECT ( (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM mk_coupon_store_rel WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId}) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mk_coupon_store_rel WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} AND store_id = #{storeId}) )
